Entries.Elliott: Why, my dear... if you insist on showering me with presents, I suppose I shall have to allow it.$h/637 348 578 226 417 445 872/This is for me? You are such a sweetheart./60 72 -79 84 303 346 459 577 595 591 768 814/Oh, darling, no. We must have standards./16 18 22 24 91 -7 -26 -81 -6/Is this supposed to be some sort of joke?/-75 149 151 154 196 296 248 767 772/Ah, an... intresting choice. But who am I to judge?/-4/

Entries.39/f Elliott 500/p Elliott: musicboxsong/2 5/farmer 3 9 0 Elliott 1 5 0/skippable/move farmer 0 -1 0/pause 400/faceDirection Elliott 2/emote Elliott 16/speak Elliott "@, I wasn't expecting company."/emote Elliott 40/speak Elliott "Well? I don't believe you came all this way simply to gawk at me, pretty as I am.$h"/pause 500/move farmer 0 -2 3/move farmer -2 0 0/pause 500/speak Elliott "Hmmm... and being covered in dirt is part of your charm, I take it?"/quickQuestion #'I mean... some of us have to work for a living. What is it you do all day?'#'Just wanted to get to know you better. Tell me about yourself.'(break)emote Elliott 16\speak Elliott "Cheeky little pup, aren't you?$h"(break)emote Elliott 16\speak Elliott "What is there to tell? It's all rather boring, really."/speak Elliott "I spend most of my time writing."/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 2/speak Elliott "I bought this little cabin a just a year prior to your being here, and started my writing endeavors."/faceDirection Elliott 1/speak Elliott "I started to write to get some coin, and well... as a form of self-healing, I suppose.$s#$b#I haven't exactly made any ground breaking poetry or novels yet, but it's enough for me."/pause 700/faceDirection Elliott 2/speak Elliott "Why, you almost look impressed, @. You really believe I can make it as an author?"/pause 500/emote Elliott 16/speak Elliott "$q 958699 null#Tell me, @, what kind of books do you like?#$r 958699 30 event_idea1#Mystery#$r 958700 30 event_idea2#Romance#$r 958701 30 event_idea3#Sci-Fi"/pause 500/speak Elliott "Well! Enough talk about me!"/pause 400/emote Elliott 16/speak Elliott "Hmm... you probably know a lot about plants, don't you?"/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 1/speak Elliott "Would you mind taking a look at this rose, here? I'm afraid I've been doing it more harm then good...$7"/pause 400/move farmer 2 0 0/move farmer 0 -2 3/pause 400/animate farmer true true 100 35/pause 200/end dialogue Elliott "Thank you for induldging me... I'll be thinking about what you said."

Strong stuff...$h"/pause 800/animate Elliott false false 400 20 21 22 21 20 21 22 21 20 21 22 21 20 21 22 21 16/pause 1000/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 800/faceDirection farmer 2/animate farmer false true 100 102 103/pause 1000/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/pause 600/stopAnimation farmer/end warpOut

Entries.61704/f Elliott 1000/t 2100 2430: ocean/42 36/farmer 33 35 1 Elliott 43 35 1/skippable/addLantern 735 40 34 1/move farmer 7 0 1/pause 1000/speak Elliott "@?"/pause 2000/faceDirection Elliott 3/pause 1000/move Elliott -1 0 3/pause 1000/speak Elliott "You know, I've been thinking. And I think there's something I should tell you.$9"/pause 500/move farmer 1 0 1/playMusic echos/speak Elliott "Nothing big or terrible... just a small little detail about me that hasn't come up naturally...$7#$b#It's just that I happen to be a-uh...$9#$b#...What's the best way to put this?$9"/pause 2000/speak Elliott "A vampire?$s"/jump farmer 4/emote farmer 16/emote Elliott 40/speak Elliott "Things haven't really changed. I'm still the same loveable rogue. My smile just happens to be a little... sharper.$u"/pause 1000/quickQuestion #'Thank you for telling me. I only wish you had confided in me sooner.'#'Well, it was a bit obvious, wasn't it?'#'A vampire!? What else are you keeping from me!?'(break)emote Elliott 32\speak Elliott "We're all entitled to our secerts, darling.$s"(break)emote Elliott 16\speak Elliott "Obvious? How was it obvious!?$8#$b#Still, I suppose I must thank you for keeping my secerts.$s"(break)emote Elliott 12\speak Elliott "Well, if you must know- I'm actually a princess of House Nightstar, and I'm married to a tarrasque named Jonathan.$a#$b#Anything ELSE you'd like to know?$a#$b#No- sorry, I know this must be a lot to take in.$7"/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 2/speak Elliott "Well, I won't keep you any longer, but you are welcome to stay if you wish."/pause 500/faceDirection farmer 2/addConversationTopic pitchforksAndTorches/end

Entries.pitchforksAndTorches: Ah, there you are, my friend! I'm grateful you've been sensisible about my... condition.#$b#I was worried you might wake up and grab your torch and pitchfork.$u#$e#You aren't carrying any concealed pitchforks, are you?$9

Entries.61705/f Elliott 1250/t 2000 2430/e 61704: nightTime/-1000 -1000/farmer 33 18 2 Elliott 34 25 2/skippable/addLantern 735 35 25 1/viewport 34 25 true/showFrame Elliott 16/move farmer 0 7 2/pause 2000/speak Elliott "Why, if it isn't my favorite farmer."/animate Elliott false false 120 16 17 18 19 19 18 18 19 19 18 18 19 19 18 18 19 19 18 18 17 16/pause 500/speak Elliott "Meandering out in the woods all by your lonesome, @? Aren't you worried about what you might find lurking in the shadows?"/quickQuestion #'Aren't you?'#'Oh please, you're probably the most dangerous thing out here.'(break)speak Elliott "Oh, darling, I'm counting on what I might find lurking in these woods. A vampire has to eat, after all.$h"(break)speak Elliott "Oh, I'm counting on it. After all, I still need to sink my fangs into my unsuspecting dinner for tonight...$h"/jump farmer 6/startJittering/faceDirection Elliott 3/emote Elliott 16/pause 500/speak Elliott "Darling, please don't be afraid. I feed on animals only, no humans, I can promise you that.$7#$b#Plus, I like you. I would never hurt you. Cross my heart and hope to- ah, well."/pause 500/stopJittering/faceDirection Elliott 2/playMusic spaceMusic/pause 500/speak Elliott "Not feeding on the humans here was part of my arrangement with the wizard.$9#$b#He provided me with a magic ring to help mitigate many of the side effects of my condition, and in exchange, I keep my fangs sheathed.$9#$b#A small price to pay to walk in the sun again.$7#$b#I spent so long banished to the shadows... I had forgotten just how much color there was in the world...$7"/pause 500/emote Elliott 40/speak Elliott "But certain symptoms still persist. The need for blood, for one. And the lack of reflection.$9"/pause 4000/speak Elliott "I've never even seen this face.$s#$b#Not since it grew fangs and my eyes turned red.$a"/pause 2000/faceDirection Elliott 3/speak Elliott "@... Be my mirror. Tell me what you see when you look at me.$l"/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 1000/quickQuestion #'A dangerous smile and piercing red eyes.'#'I see... creases when you laugh, your eyes gleaming when you're being particularly mischevious.'#'Honestly, no reflection is probably for the best. You're not exactly aging gracefully.'(break)friendship Elliott 50\emote Elliott 32\speak Elliott "Oh, very good.$h#$b#Now, just tell me I'm beautiful and we can call it a night.$u"(break)friendship Elliott 50\emote Elliott 16\speak Elliott "Creases? Do I look like your doting grandmother?$8#$b#This is meant to be flattery, not poetry!#$b#Just tell me I'm beautiful and we can call it a night.$u"(break)friendship Elliott -50\emote Elliott 12\speak Elliott "Aging? What do you mean, aging?$8#$b#I am a vampire - forever young!$a"/quickQuestion #'Is that really all you want? Shallow praise?'#'You're beautiful, Astarion.'(break)speak Elliott "Hardly, there is also gold, sex, revenge, quite the list, really.#$b#But failing any of those, I will always settle for shallow praise.$h"(break)speak Elliott "Observant."/faceDirection Elliott 2/faceDirection farmer 2/pause 1000/speak Elliott "Well, it's getting late.#$b#I better go catch up on my beauty sleep. Goodnight, darling."/move Elliott 0 -6 0 true/addConversationTopic dealingsWithVampires/pause 1000/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/end

Entries.dealingsWithVampires: So, the spawn told you about our deal, did he?#$b#I would never have agreed to it if I didn't believe he would hold up his end of the bargain.#$b#But, if you ever see him put one fang out of line, come straight to me and he'll find himself relegated back to the darkness he crawled out of.

Entries.423502/f Elliott 1500/p Elliott: elliottPiano/-200 -1000/farmer 3 9 0 Elliott 8 4 0/skippable/positionOffset Elliott 32 16/animate Elliott false true 400 25 26 26 27 27 26 26 25 26 27 27 26 26 25/pause 1000/viewport 8 4 true/pause 24000/stopAnimation Elliott/showFrame Elliott 24/move farmer 0 -3 0/move farmer 4 0 0/showFrame Elliott 28/pause 1000/speak Elliott "Oh, hello... I wasn't expecting anyone.$7"/pause 1000/showFrame Elliott 30/animate Elliott false false 200 28 29 30/playSound dwop/pause 1000/speak Elliott "In truth, I'm feeling rather morose today...$7"/question fork1 "#'Whatever is going on, you don't have to go through alone.'#'Is there anything I can do to help?"/fork offerHelp/pause 500/emote Elliott 32/speak Elliott "You really are a sweetheart, you know that? Sometimes I forget... Thank you."/switchEvent elliottPianoJoin
Entries.offerHelp: emote Elliott 16/pause 500/resetVariable/speak Elliott "Just being here with me right now... it means a lot.#$b#But I guess if you really want to help, you could listen to me vent for a bit.$s"/switchEvent elliottPianoJoin
Entries.elliottPianoJoin: continue/pause 800/showFrame Elliott 0/animate Elliott false true 220 0 1 2 3/playSound woodyStep/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/pause 120/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/pause 120/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/pause 120/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/pause 120/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/pause 120/positionOffset Elliott 0 8/stopAnimation Elliott/faceDirection Elliott 2/pause 500/move Elliott 1 0 1 true/faceDirection farmer 1/playMusic shaneTheme/pause 1500/showFrame Elliott 31/pause 800/emote Elliott 28/speak Elliott "Piano was one of the many things tainted for me by Cazador- My sire.$s"/showFrame Elliott 4/pause 800/move Elliott -2 0 0/pause 800/speak Elliott "It was one of the many ways- amongst other, more unsavory asks- that he would have entertain his... guests.$7#$b#Sometimes he would have me play nonstop for days until my fingers bled and the sound of music would intertwine with my screams of pain.$s#$b#He always said my screams sounded sweetest.$s"/pause 600/faceDirection Elliott 2/speak Elliott "Playing piano again for myself, and only myself, is one of the ways I'm trying to reclaim the pieces of me that he took.$9#$b#It's been a winding and painful journey to find myself again.$9#$b#Sometimes, I don't think I'll ever be truly free of him- the scars he left behind, the wounds that never close...$7#$b#Writing was supposed to be a way to help process and maybe contribute something meaningful for once.$s#$b#But, I'm just not so sure that all this looking back is the way to move forward.$s"/pause 300/faceDirection farmer 0/question fork1 "#'Astarion, you've got this- and I've got you.'#'Maybe you should spend less time whining and more time actually working on yourself.'"/fork badAdviceToAstarion6/playMusic none/pause 500/emote Elliott 16/speak Elliott "Thanks, @.$0#$b#You always seem to see the best in me, even when I struggle to see it myself.$l"/playMusic elliottPiano/question null "#'That's because I know there's so much more to you than meets the eye.'#'I'm here to support you every step of the way.'"/speak Elliott "It means a lot to me.$l#$b#You've shown me kindness and acceptance, even when I had my walls up."/move Elliott 0 1 3/faceDirection farmer 1/speak Elliott "Thank you, @, truly. Your support has been a gift. I won't forget it.$l"/animate Elliott true true 100 31/pause 800/emote Elliott 20/pause 500/speak Elliott "I have some work to do.$0#$b#Who knows, maybe I'll even surprise myself.$1"/pause 500/addConversationTopic astarionThankful/stopAnimation Elliott/pause 600/faceDirection Elliott 3/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/end
Entries.badAdviceToAstarion6: /pause 500/emote Elliott 28/friendship Elliott -1250/speak Elliott "Excuse me?$s#$b#I am painfully aware of my own shortcomings.$s#$b#But you- you don't get to judge me.$a"/faceDirection Elliott 3/speak Elliott "Ridiculous- to think I actually trusted you.$a"/faceDirection Elliott 1/emote Elliott 12/question null "#'I didn't mean to come across dismissive.'#'Maybe I'm just not intrested in feeding you whatever lie you would rather hear.'"/speak Elliott "Is that so?$a#$b#I thought we were having a real conversation here, but I clearly overestimated you.$s#$b#I won't be making that mistake again.$s"/pause 500/speak Elliott "Get your sorry carcass out of my sight and go rot, for all I care.$a"/addConversationTopic astarionAngry/viewport -1000 -1000/end dialogue Elliott "Ugh, it's you. Checking in to see if I'm working on myself?$a#$e#You again...$a"

Entries.astarionThankful: Hello, darling. Thank you for listening the other night.#$b#You inspired me to continue working on my novel, even if it means facing painful memories.
Entries.astarionAngry: You are on some very thin ice... darling.$a#$e#By the gods, what do you want now?

Entries.1848481/f Elliott 2000/t 1300 1900/n ell: breezy/14 11/Elliott 14 9 2 Pierre 10 13 1 Caroline 11 13 3 Marnie 11 15 1 Lewis 12 15 3 Sebastian 11 17 2 Abigail 12 18 3 Sam 10 18 1 Leah 15 15 0 Emily 16 16 2 Clint 15 17 1 Jodi 19 13 2 Robin 20 14 3 Demetrius 20 11 3 Maru 10 10 1 Penny 11 9 1 Gus 18 16 0 Shane 19 16 0 Willy 21 11 3 farmer 6 14 1/skippable/move farmer 6 0 0/move farmer 0 -1 0/move Elliott 0 4 3/faceDirection farmer 1/speak Elliott "@, you made it! I was worried for moment you wouldn't come...#$b#I am relieved my book is finally done. With all this hard work I've barely had any time for rabble-rousing.$u#$b#Surprised? Even I'm capable of hard work from time to time.$h"/pause 800/faceDirection Elliott 2/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 1/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 3/pause 500/speak Elliott "Well, I'd better get started with the reading... Wish me luck, darling.$8"/pause 700/move Elliott 0 -4 2/faceDirection farmer 0/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 1/faceDirection Elliott 2/faceDirection Elliott 3/faceDirection Elliott 2/speak Elliott "Good afternoon, everyone."/pause 500/faceDirection Caroline 0 true/faceDirection Emily 0 true/textAboveHead Emily "Hi!"/faceDirection Abigail 0/faceDirection Sebastian 0 true/faceDirection Lewis 0/faceDirection Sam 0 true/faceDirection Marnie 0/faceDirection Pierre 0 true/faceDirection Jodi 0/faceDirection Clint 0/speak Elliott "For some time now, I've dedicated myself to writing.#$b#When the time came for me to leave my old life behind and start a new one, I moved here,#$b#hoping that days of quiet reflection in this idyllic atmosphere would fan the literary flames."/showFrame Elliott 32/pause 200/showFrame Elliott 34/fork 958699 mysteryBook/fork 958700 romanceBook/speak Elliott "After countless hours scribbling at my writing desk, I present to you my first novel: 'The Ascension'... It's a sci-fi epic set in an exotic planetary system."/animate Elliott false true 1000 33 33 34/pause 500/speak Elliott "Chapter One.#$b#The proud gith warrior stepped through the golden portal, greatsword in hand.#$b#Lae'zel had been training her whole life to take down her people's sworn enemies and she would not fail.#$b#She affixes her goal clearly in her mind: become Vlaakith's chosen..."/playMusic none/globalFade/viewport -100 -100/pause 1000/warp Sebastian -1000 -1000/warp Sam -1000 -1000/warp Abigail -1000 -1000/warp Jodi -1000 -1000/warp Robin -1000 -1000/warp Demetrius -1000 -1000/warp Shane -1000 -1000/warp Maru -1000 -1000/warp Pierre -1000 -1000/warp Caroline -1000 -1000/viewport 14 11 true/pause 1000/speak Elliott "...And as the 7th moon descended beneath the horizon, those infected by parasites would begin their sinister transformations...#$b#and Lae'zel would show them no mercy. 'Htak'a! Victory awaits!'"/stopAnimation Elliott/showFrame Elliott 34/pause 800/speak Elliott "Well, that concludes my reading. I'll be selling signed copies of the book by the front desk.#$b#Thanks for listening!$h"/faceDirection Lewis 3/faceDirection Marnie 1/faceDirection Emily 2 true/faceDirection Clint 1/move Elliott 0 4 3/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 600/speak Elliott "Do you think that went well? Oh, what am I saying...#$b#You can't spell Astarion without 'A STAR!'$u#$b#But really, what did you think?"/emote farmer 32/speak Elliott "Thank you.$h#$b#You know, I got the idea for making a sci-fi book from you. Do you remember?#$b#That's why I've dedicated this book to you...$l"/addConversationTopic oldFriends/move Elliott -1 0 3/emote Elliott 32/pause 1000/end
Entries.mysteryBook: pause 400/speak Elliott "After countless hours scribbling at my writing desk, I present to you my first book: 'Lady of Loss'... It's a mystery novel centered around an enigmatic cult."/animate Elliott false true 1000 33 33 34/pause 500/speak Elliott "Chapter One.#$b#Shadowheart blinked awake in the bright light. Her memories a blank, obscured spot in her mind. She looked down at the metal icosahedron in her hand.#$b#An all-consuming thought filled her mind: get the artifact to The House of Healing at all costs...'"/playMusic none/globalFade/viewport -100 -100/pause 1000/warp Sebastian -1000 -1000/warp Sam -1000 -1000/warp Abigail -1000 -1000/warp Jodi -1000 -1000/warp Robin -1000 -1000/warp Demetrius -1000 -1000/warp Shane -1000 -1000/warp Maru -1000 -1000/warp Pierre -1000 -1000/warp Caroline -1000 -1000/viewport 14 11 true/pause 1000/speak Elliott "She couldn't help but feeling like someone important was waiting for her back in the city. That returning this artifact was the key to reuniting with them again.#$b#As vague memories rose to the surface, threatening to reveal her veiled past,#$b#a searing pain shot through Shadowheart's hand, glowing with the dark energy of her lady's reprobation..."/stopAnimation Elliott/showFrame Elliott 34/pause 800/speak Elliott "Well, that concludes my reading. I'll be selling signed copies of the book by the front desk. Thanks for listening!$h"/faceDirection Lewis 3/faceDirection Marnie 1/faceDirection Emily 2 true/faceDirection Clint 1/move Elliott 0 4 3/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 600/speak Elliott "Do you think that went well? Oh, what am I saying, afterall...#$b#You can't spell Astarion without 'A STAR!'$u#$b#But really, what did you think?"/emote farmer 32/speak Elliott "Thanks. $h#$b#You know, I got the idea for making a mystery from you. Do you remember?#$b#That's why I've dedicated this book to you...$l"/addConversationTopic oldFriends/move Elliott -1 0 3/emote Elliott 32/pause 1000/end
Entries.romanceBook: pause 400/speak Elliott "After countless hours scribbling at my writing desk, I present to you my first novel: 'The Heartforge'... It's a romance novel about a traveling mercenary who falls in love with a blacksmith..."/animate Elliott false true 1000 33 33 34/pause 500/speak Elliott "Chapter One.#$b#The mighty tiefling warrior, Karlach, burned like the hells, fire running through her veins.#$b#Most would shy away from getting too close from one with an infernal engine for a heart, but the blacksmith isn't just anyone..."/playMusic none/globalFade/viewport -100 -100/pause 1000/warp Sebastian -1000 -1000/warp Sam -1000 -1000/warp Abigail -1000 -1000/warp Jodi -1000 -1000/warp Robin -1000 -1000/warp Demetrius -1000 -1000/warp Shane -1000 -1000/warp Maru -1000 -1000/warp Pierre -1000 -1000/warp Caroline -1000 -1000/viewport 14 11 true/pause 1000/speak Elliott "...'Thanks for the tune-up, soilder.' Karlach said, 'Should keep the ol' girl ticking a while longer.'#$b#Dammon smiled sadly up at Karlach- surely there was a longer term solution to keeping her heart beating, he was sure of it and he would find it.#$b#And in a kinder world- he may have even found it in time..."/stopAnimation Elliott/showFrame Elliott 34/pause 800/speak Elliott "Well, that concludes my reading. I'll be selling signed copies of the book by the front desk. Thanks for listening.$h"/faceDirection Lewis 3/faceDirection Marnie 1/faceDirection Emily 2 true/faceDirection Clint 1/move Elliott 0 4 3/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 600/speak Elliott "Do you think that went well? Oh, what am I saying, afterall...#$b#You can't spell Astarion without 'A STAR!'$u#$b#But really, what did you think?"/emote farmer 32/speak Elliott "Thanks.$h#$b#You know, I got the idea for writing a romance novel from you. Do you remember?#$b#That's why I've dedicated this book to you...$l"/addConversationTopic oldFriends/move Elliott -1 0 3/emote Elliott 32/pause 1000/end

Entries.oldFriends: Remind me to tell you more about my traveling companions that inspired the stories in my novel.#$b#You would have liked them.

Entries.61709/f Elliott 2250/t 2100 2430: AbigailFlute/47 90/farmer 43 91 1 Elliott 47 87 0/skippable/addLantern 735 46 86 1/move farmer 1 0 0/move farmer 0 -4 1/emote farmer 8/move farmer 2 0 1/pause 200/showFrame Elliott 0/faceDirection Elliott 3/speak Elliott "Hello, @, darling.#$b#I didn't expect to see anyone here, especially in the graveyard at this hour."/pause 400/speak Elliott "I know, undead vampire lurking in the graveyard at night, so gauche.$1#$b#But, then again... maybe some things are classics for a reason.$0"/faceDirection Elliott 0/pause 1000/speak Elliott "Nearly a millenia ago, I woke up in a graveyard much like this one.$9"/pause 200/pause 300/speak Elliott "I had to punch a hole in the coffin and claw my way through six feet of dirt.$9#$bThere was nothing left of the person I was. Just a name on a rock.$s"/pause 500/speak Elliott "For the next two centuries I stalked the streets like a ghost, while the person I was lay buried.$9#$b#Dead and forgotten.$s"/emote farmer 28/pause 300/speak Elliott "Then I found friends. People who cared about me.#$b#They helped me find my way out of that dark place."/move Elliott 1 0 1/showFrame Elliott 31/speak Elliott "But... the curse of immortality is watching those you hold dear eventually fade away.$s#$b#And once again I was alone. Bitter.$s#$b#I got lost on purpose and put away all that hope.$s"/emote Elliott 28/pause 500/move Elliott -1 0 3/speak Elliott "But then you showed up.#$b#You are a better friend than I could ever have hoped to find again - or even have deserved.$l#$b#It is hard at times to be vulnerable. For centuries I equated being vulnerable to being weak... even pathetic.$s#$b#I’m still getting used to this... $9"/pause 500/emote Elliott 40/speak Elliott "...this allowing myself to feel all these emotions, I suppose.$9"/pause 500/speak Elliott "Thanks for listening, @. I should head home."/move Elliott 0 4 2/faceDirection farmer 2/move Elliott -3 0 3/pause 700/emote Elliott 40/pause 200/speed Elliott 3/move Elliott 2 0 0/speed Elliott 3/move Elliott 0 -3 0/speak Elliott "You're the first person in a long time that I've truly cared for.$l#$b#Thank you for being patient with me. For caring."/pause 200/emote farmer 20/speak Elliott "Sweet dreams, darling."/advancedMove Elliott false 0 3 -7 0 3 1000/pause 800/end

Entries.43/f Elliott 2500/w sunny/t 700 1300/G !: ocean/-1000 -1000/farmer 13 16 2 Elliott 13 27 1/specificTemporarySprite elliottBoat/skippable/viewport 17 26 clamp true/move farmer 0 8 2/faceDirection Elliott 0/speak Elliott "Hello, my sweet."/move farmer 0 2 2/faceDirection Elliott 1/faceDirection farmer 1/speak Elliott "Look... I fixed up that old rowboat that's been sitting by my house. Not too bad a job, huh?"/pause 500/faceDirection Elliott 0/pause 500/speak Elliott "@... Would you do me the honor of joining me for her maiden voyage?$l"/faceDirection farmer 2/question fork1 "Get in the boat?#Yes#No"/fork NoToElliott/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/changeToTemporaryMap ElliottSea/playSound wateringCan/pause 1000/playSound wateringCan/playMusic kindadumbautumn/warp farmer 26 20/positionOffset farmer 0 8/warp Elliott 26 20/showFrame Elliott 25/positionOffset Elliott 0 60/viewport 25 20 true/pause 5000/speak Elliott "So my book's been out for a while now... It's not a best-seller or anything, but it's been getting some good reviews from the critics.#$b#And I really couldn't have finished it without your moral support.$l"/pause 1000/speak Elliott "Actually, that's not true at all. I probably would've finished it regardless.$u#$b#But, I am grateful that you believed in me. You were by my side through all this. You were patient. You cared. And, well..."/pause 500/speak Elliott "Um... @? How do I say this..."/emote Elliott 40/speak Elliott "I didn't care for you when we first met."/emote farmer 16/speak Elliott "But I do now. I feel safe with you. Seen.$l"/pause 2000/speak Elliott "I remember how I used to be so guarded, and maybe even a bit mean.$9#$b#Okay, maybe a lot mean.$u#$b#But you saw past that exterior, you believed in me, even when I didn't believe in myself.#$b#And slowly, without me realizing, you became someone I trusted and cared for deeply.$l"/pause 1000/speak Elliott "Through our ups and downs, we built a connection.#$b#And I'm grateful for every step of this journey that led us here, to this moment.$l"/pause 2500/speak Elliott "I have to ask, @, given the plethora of more...$s#$b#blatantly obvious choices you have at your disposal back in Pelican Valley...$s"/speak Elliott "$q -1 null#Is this truly what you want? Am I what you want?$l#$r -1 50 event_boat1#Yes, Astarion. I want this. I want you.#$r -1 -250 event_boat2#No,I'm sorry I've let this go on for as long as it has. I would rather stay friends."/fork tooBold/playMusic elliottPiano/emote Elliott 20/showFrame Elliott 35/screenFlash 1/warp Elliott 26 20/positionOffset Elliott 24 8/positionOffset farmer -20 16/faceDirection farmer 1 true/showFrame 101/specificTemporarySprite heart 26 20/playSound dwop/pause 1500/speak Elliott "You are perfect, every time.$l"/pause 2000/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/speak Elliott "We'd better head back before the southern wind picks up.$l"/pause 1400/speak Elliott "Looking at the valley from here... it feels like I can call it 'Home' for once..."/end dialogue Elliott "We are rather excellent together, you know.$l"
Entries.NoToElliott: emote Elliott 16/pause 800/friendship Elliott -50/faceDirection Elliott 1/showFrame Elliott 31/pause 1000/emote Elliott 28/pause 600/speak Elliott "Darling, I'm hurt. I thought we had something special.$7"/move farmer 0 -10 0 true/pause 800/end dialogue Elliott "Do you mind? I'm brooding.$a"

Entries.tooBold: playMusic none/friendship Elliott -500/emote Elliott 28/speak Elliott "Then this is where we leave it. Let's get back to shore.$s"/pause 1000/end dialogue Elliott "It's a pity. We were rather excellent together.$s#$e#I need some time alone, darling... Please.$s"

Entries.elliottReading: @,^I have great news... my novel is finished!! I'm giving a public reading this afternoon at the library. If you have time I'd like for you to stop by to hear it. ^   -Astarion[#]Elliott's Reading
Entries.elliottBoat: Meet me at the docks on a sunny morning. I have something I'd like to show you. ^   -Astarion[#]Elliott's Note
Entries.elliottLetter1: @, my love,^^I've just arrived in Grampleton, to start the tour. I've forgotten how hectic the city life is... The streets are packed with people... they either seem in a mad hurry, or lost in a daze, unaware of their surroundings. It's a nice change of pace but I do miss you already!^^I begin the tour this evening, at a local bookstore. I must admit, I'm becoming a bit nervous at the thought of public speaking... my stomach feels knotted, as if it was saying: 'More like Drizzt Don't'Urden' - no. No that's not funny. Clearly the nerves are getting the best of me. Wish me luck!^^-Love, Your Handsome Husband Astarion^^P.S. I hope you had a peaceful night despite surely missing me terribly already! %item conversationTopic ElliottGone2 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband
Entries.elliottLetter2: My little treat,^^The first reading went well, though the audience was a bit smaller than I'd been secretly hoping for. Still, I sold enough copies of the book to pay for my (bug-infested) hotel room!^^In a few hours, I leave for Zuzu City. If yesterday's reading was a warm-up, this next one will be a true napalm blast...^^I miss you very much. Remember to eat well! There's a hidden bottle of pomegrante wine under the cupboard behind a cooking book if you need a little refresher.^-Love, Your Amazingly Talented Charming Handsome Husband Astarion %item conversationTopic ElliottGone3 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband 2
Entries.elliottLetter3: My sweet @,^^Last night in Zuzu City was quite the experience! It seems there's a large literary scene here... a few dozen people showed up at my reading!^^I even signed some autographs, I had to make an excuse for not allowing photography... that my eyes were sensitive to bright lights, the usual drabble. It's nice though, I feel important...^^Currently I'm alone, in my hotel room, 'ingesting' some 'wine'.^^Should this be called wine? Perhaps vinegar is a better denomination.^I needn't long brood.^It must be the latter.^^I look forward to returning home to you soon.^^-Love, Your Amazingly Talented, Strong, Charming, Handsome Husband Astarion %item conversationTopic ElliottGone4 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband 3
Entries.elliottLetter4: In dreams, when graced with lofty view^I gaze upon the sunlit sea^What distant shores I've travelled to^I won't deny I've got in my mind^^All the things we'd do^So I'll try to talked refined^for fear that you'd find out^How I'm imagining you^^-Astarion %item conversationTopic ElliottGone5 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband 4
Entries.elliottLetter5: My darling @,^^I won't bore you with any more details about my readings. They are mostly the same.^^I'm sure your time has been much more exciting! I can't wait to return and see what progress has been made.^^On these long travels between towns, I amuse myself by closing my eyes and envisioning the farm... I see kegs pulsing with sweet wine, a furnace ablaze with precious ore, and our little kitchen with the smell of cinnamon and nutmeg. There's a lot to enjoy!^^Just don't stay out too late in the mines, my love. It's dangerous in there! If you must go... bring plenty of food.^^-Love, Your Astarion %item conversationTopic ElliottGone6 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband 5
Entries.elliottLetter6: My dear @,^^This will be my last letter before I return home. I've had a fine trip... though nothing too exciting. It's been nice to meet people who enjoy my work...^^And yet, all these accolades are nothing compared to the sound of my name, cried from your lips.^^I could go on and on with the flattery, but I rather whisper sweet nothings to you in person. I'll see you soon, my love.^-Your Astarion %item conversationTopic ElliottGone7 0 %%[#]Letter From My Husband 6

Entries.SummitEvent_Dialogue3_Elliott: I was lost and trying to find myself for years. $9#$b#With you, I've found myself again, and I promise I'll be here for every step of your journey...$l#$b# I'm with you my dear, whereever this leads.$1

Entries.Elliott_spouse: I can't eat many dishes, but this sandwich has such perfect rare, succulent meat... *gurgle*$s
Entries.Elliott: I'm trying to get Gus to tell me know where he gets his meat supply from, but he's surprisingly secretive about it...
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: Victory! I have achieved a score of '216' with five fish caught... a new personal best!$1#$e#Now to break that record as well!$0
Entries.Elliott_y2: Ah apologies for the smell... I just emerged from the fishing booth. I've obtained a new record for myself!$1#$e#Now, I must decide what to do with all these star tokens...$0

Entries.Elliott_spouse: You go have fun in the maze, darling, wouldn't want a real monster lurking in those hedges...$h
Entries.Elliott: Why, hello @. Fancying a trip into the maze now, are you?
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: I hope those things are securely detained...%noturn$2#$e#Fear not, my dear! I would tear these things apart if they so much as looked at you.
Entries.Elliott_y2: Ugh, where did they find these wretched things...%noturn$0#$e#They better be properly restrained.

Entries.Elliott_spouse: I hid some rotten eggs on the tops of some choice townspeople's' houses...$h#$b#Fine, I'll pick them up later...#$b#...Much later...
Entries.Elliott: Hello, @, taking a break from farm work to enjoy leisurely festival activites?
Entries.Elliott_y2: Be careful you don't accidentally take a raven's egg. They don't forget easily and they hold grudges for a lifetime...

Entries.Elliott: I do love this festival, if only for the fact that every year I hope someone embarrasses themselves dramatically. The dancing is still nice, though...
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: May I have this dance, darling?$4
Entries.Elliott_y2: Another flower dance. I do hope something more exciting happens this time around...$1

Entries.Elliott: I woke up late, stepped out of the door and found myself surrounded by half the town!$a#$e#I forgot that today was the Luau.$s
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: I would suggest we make time for a little 'rendezvous' in my old cabin... just the two of us... alone.$1
Entries.Elliott_y2: Ah, the Luau... now if only they didn't leave trash in front of my cabin...$5

Entries.Elliott_spouse: Ah, hello there, my love. There's a nice summer breeze in the air..$h#$e#Come stand beside me for a moment...$l
Entries.Elliott: The oceans continue to get polluted, the jellies will surely go extinct. It's already in the process of happening.#$e#What a shame... how quickly things appear and then get snuffed out...$s
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: Ah, I was wondering when you would arrive...$0#$e#Come on now, let's head to the docks, darling.$1

Entries.Elliott_spouse: Darling, just because we're married doesn't mean I will go easy on you. Prepare yourself!$h
Entries.Elliott: I'm entering the ice fishing competition today. Why not?#$e#It's rare that Willy ever loses, though.
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: I've been practicing my dear, this won't be as easy this year...$1
Entries.Elliott_y2: Do try this year, I won't be holding back.

Entries.Elliott_spouse: Darling, you don't have to get me anything for this silly holiday...$u#$e# However, if your offering, I wouldn't turn down a bite..$h
Entries.Elliott: Gods, it's freezing! I don't understand how anyone here can stand it!$a
Entries.Elliott_spouse_y2: My dear, I require nothing at all on this day... well, I wouldn't turn down a kiss..$h
Entries.Elliott_y2: *Urp*$1#$b#Ahh... excuse me. Where are my manners? I leave the blood supping for later...$3

Entries.7: It's a page from someone's diary...^^...There are only a few 'older' bachelors in town, and none of them are perfect! Harvey is really anxious and weak, but I know he would make a loyal and devoted husband. He likes coffee and pickles.^^Astarion is a bit foppish and melodramatic, but he does have nice hair. He likes Star Shards and Pomegranates.^^Shane is messy and anti-social. But I think his gruff exterior is a defense mechanism, insulating his softness from the world. He likes Beer, Pizza, and Pepper Poppers.%revealtaste:Harvey:395%revealtaste:Harvey:342%revealtaste:Elliott:578%revealtaste:Elliott:637%revealtaste:Shane:346%revealtaste:Shane:206%revealtaste:Shane:215

Entries.ElliottHouse.2: Astarion's work desk. It's covered in notes and crumpled papers, and is that blood?
Entries.ElliottHouse.4: It looks like Astarion is trying to grow a bonsai tree. It looks cool so far!
Entries.ElliottHouse.6: It looks like Astarion is trying to grow a bonsai tree. It looks cool so far!
